---
name: 🔧 Improve a skill
about: Suggest a fix, improvement, or addition to an existing skill
title: '[IMPROVE] '
labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Which skill?

Link to the SKILL.md file or name the skill.

## What needs improving?

Describe the issue clearly: missing step, unclear instruction, incorrect measurement, missing safety note, etc.

## Suggested fix

If you have a suggestion, share it here.
